404.title: This page wandered off.
404.subtitle: The page you're after doesn't exist — but the good stuff is one tap away.

consent.heading: A quiet word about cookies
consent.text: We'd like to use analytics and marketing cookies to understand what's working. Nothing loads until you say yes, and 'essential only' is a perfectly good answer.

newsletter.label: Email address
newsletter.success: Lovely — you're in. Check your inbox for the plan and your code.
newsletter.error: Hmm, that email didn't work — mind trying again?
newsletter.privacy: Email only. No noise, unsubscribe whenever.

contact.name: Name
contact.success: Thank you — we'll reply within two working days.
contact.error: Something needs fixing below — please check and resend.

disclaimer.food_supplement: Food supplements should not be used as a substitute for a varied, balanced diet and a healthy lifestyle.
disclaimer.caution: For healthy adults. Not suitable if pregnant or breastfeeding. Consult your GP if taking medication or managing a condition.

footer.tagline: The strength you build helps build hers.

trust.defaults: 5g Creatine | 5g Verisol® Collagen | Complete Multivitamin | Halal GB18 | Made in UK | Batch Tested | 21 Servings

math.footnote: Typical UK retail prices, rounded — verify before publishing. Ingredient-for-ingredient at comparable doses; sources on request.

science.panel_title: The full panel · per 14g scoop · 13 actives, every one disclosed
science.claims_note: Claim wording note: nutrition and health claims on this page follow the wording authorised on the GB nutrition and health claims register. Botanical entries reflect traditional use only and are not efficacy claims. Food supplements should not be used as a substitute for a varied, balanced diet and a healthy lifestyle.

reviews.placeholder: Reviews coming soon — we only publish verified reviews from real customers, and we'd rather show you nothing than something invented.
reviews.verification_note: Every review shown is from a verified purchase, quoted with permission.

facts.lede: Per 14g scoop · 21 servings per 300g pouch. This is the locked v14 panel — the same numbers on the pouch, the site and the certificate.
facts.note: NRV = Nutrient Reference Value. Botanical entries reflect traditional use only. Third-party tested — COA per lot; check your batch code against the certificate. Food supplements should not be used as a substitute for a varied, balanced diet and a healthy lifestyle.
